citation.description: decide_outcome_counts defined in review_kernel/telemetry.py, exported from review_kernel/__init__.py lines 60-65. Called by plan_review/workflow_ops.py:505 and code_review/workflow_ops.py:409. Both emit 'outcome_counts' in their return dicts.

criteria.criterion: plan_review_decide and code_review_decide both emit an outcome_counts field computed by ONE shared review_kernel helper — no duplicated tallying logic between the two pipelines.

citation.description: collect_contract_violations() activated in _run_code_review_gate via 'with gate_source.gate_read_root(handle), review_kernel.collect_contract_violations():'. code_review/workflow_ops.py:408 calls review_kernel.record_contract_violation(); line 514 drains it; line 516 writes coverage["verification_contract_violations"]. The sink implementation lives in review_kernel/telemetry.py and is the same one plan_review/orchestrator.py re-exports at lines 325-327.

criteria.criterion: code_review_decide records contract violations via the SAME shared collect_contract_violations/record_contract_violation/drain_contract_violations sink plan_review_decide uses (moved into review_kernel), activated in gate_dispatch._run_code_review_gate and drained into finalize_code_review_verdict's coverage["verification_contract_violations"].

citation.description: New tests at lines 223-320 cover code-review's outcome_counts (clean/recovered/empty_outcomes paths) and contract-violation propagation through decide and coach. test_review_kernel.py lines 700-760 cover the moved sink from its new shared location (review_kernel). test_plan_review_workflow.py lines 579-634 show existing plan-review tests use orchestrator.collect_contract_violations() which is now a re-export from review_kernel (lines 325-327 of orchestrator.py).

criteria.criterion: Existing plan-review and code-review test suites continue to pass unmodified (sink move is mechanical relocation); new tests cover code-review's outcome_counts/contract-violation propagation specifically, and at least one test covers the moved sink from its new shared location for both pipelines.

citation.description: code_review_decide returns {decided, outcome_counts, ...buckets} additively — no existing key removed, verdict shape (BLOCK/PASS) unchanged. code_review_coach assembles coverage with additive outcome_counts and conditional verification_contract_violations keys. No threshold or impact function changes detected in review_kernel/decide.py or either pipeline.

criteria.criterion: No change to either pipeline's decision thresholds, impact functions, or verdict shape (outcome_counts and verification_contract_violations are additive coverage keys only).
